title: BG Electrical Single Switched Power Plug Wall Socket, Raised and Slim Profile, Round Edges, Nexus Metal, Black Nickel, 13A, NBN21B
features: SLEEK AND SLIM BLACK NICKEL SINGLE SWITCHED POWER SOCKET: With double pole switching, so it switches both the live and neutral to for safe isolation of the plugged-in appliance.
PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, and a slim profile – combining quality with modern elegance

QUICK AND SIMPLE INSTALLATION: Angled in-line colour coded terminals allow fast and secure installation, whilst captive backed-out terminal screws prevent screw loss. Minimum mounting box depth 25mm, ideal for retro-fit
FIXED INTEGRATED MOISTURE GASKET : Prevents metal edges from tarnishing when installing on new plaster.
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
